milestones.title: Foundation Established
milestones.description: WhiteHouse Education Foundation begins its mission to expand quality higher education in Eastern Nepal.

milestones.title: WCBT Jhapa Campus Opens
milestones.description: The first campus launches with a focus on technology and business education, serving the Jhapa region.

milestones.title: KU Partnership Formalized
milestones.description: Kathmandu University affiliation brings recognized BIT and B.Tech Ed IT programs to our campus.

milestones.title: Regional Impact Recognition
milestones.description: WCBT becomes recognized as a trusted institution contributing to Eastern Nepal's educational and technological advancement.

milestones.title: Expanding Excellence
milestones.description: New research labs, expanded facilities, and growing industry partnerships strengthen our academic ecosystem.

values.title: Academic Excellence
values.description: Rigorous standards, innovative teaching, and continuous improvement in all we do.

values.title: Student-Centered Approach
values.description: Every decision prioritizes student success, growth, and career readiness.

values.title: Community Impact
values.description: Creating positive change through education, research, and community engagement.
